title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI to accelerate development capabilities, with projections of 40% more capabilities in 2026. High-adoption teams are deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster than baseline.
